name: Academy of Environmental Planning and Design, Co.,Ltd. Nanjing University
summary: Academy of Environmental Planning and Design, Co.,Ltd. Nanjing University, operates an institute for higher learning and research centers in China and internationally. It provides environmental science research and teaching services. The company offers environmental protection services, including consulting, environmental planning, engineering design, environmental impact assessment, supervision and verification, clean production, water resources demonstration, education and training, etc. for various levels of government and development zones. It also provides services to alumni working in environmental protection related fields. The company is based in Nanjing, China.
